notes: set tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
norm_num tactic NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
linarith NOT available, ring NOT available
split_ifs NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib - use by_cases
by_contra NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib - use Classical.byContradiction
push_neg NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib
lemma keyword NOT available in Lean 4 stdlib (only in Mathlib). Use theorem instead.
Expo.lean is at ROOT namespace (no namespace wrapper) - constrainRat, expoRat, expo_* are all root-level names. open PX4.Expo does NOT work.
Deadzone.lean is in namespace PX4.Deadzone - use open PX4.Deadzone or fully-qualified PX4.Deadzone.X
Rat.lt_of_lt_of_le does NOT exist - use Std.lt_of_lt_of_le
Rat.le_of_lt works for le from lt
neg/div: Rat.neg_div does not exist. Use Rat.div_def + Rat.neg_mul + simp [Rat.sub_eq_add_neg, Rat.neg_add, Rat.neg_neg]
omega works for Nat.mod_lt and modular arithmetic
